summary.key_theme: 執行長黃仁勳對 AI 需求的高度信心以及即將到來的 Computex 展會，持續推動市場對 NVIDIA 的長期成長預期。

bullish.title: Jensen Huang Says Nvidia Will Pour $150 Billion A Year Into 'Booming' AI Hub Taiwan
bullish.reason: NVIDIA 宣布每年將在台灣投入 1,500 億美元，顯示公司對 AI 基礎設施的長期承諾與強勁的資本擴張能力。

bullish.title: Why Jensen Huang Is Confident AI Spending From Hyperscalers Is Going to Only Get Bigger in the Future
bullish.reason: 執行長黃仁勳指出超大規模雲端服務商的 AI 支出將持續超乎預期，直接支撐了 NVIDIA 的營收成長邏輯。

bullish.title: Prediction: Nvidia Stock Is Going to $400 Within 1 Year
bullish.reason: 基於強勁的獲利成長潛力，市場對股價目標價給予正面預測，反映了投資人對其基本面的信心。

bullish.title: This is why NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) is a Top Stock to Buy for The Long Term
bullish.reason: Baird 重申對 NVIDIA 的「優於大盤」評級，強化了該股作為長期核心資產的市場共識。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer Says Dell's Blowout Quarter Could Mark A Turning Point For AI Stocks Like Nvidia And Intel
bullish.reason: Dell 的強勁財報被視為 AI 產業鏈的領先指標，間接驗證了 NVIDIA 產品的市場需求熱度。

bearish.title: These Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks Have Crushed Nvidia in 2026 With Gains of 67% and 121%
bearish.reason: 報導指出其他 AI 供應鏈股票（如 Lumentum）漲幅超越 NVIDIA，可能導致部分資金配置轉移。

bearish.title: Why NVDY Shareholders Miss Half of NVIDIA’s Explosive Moves in Strong Months
bearish.reason: 分析指出透過衍生性商品 ETF 參與 NVIDIA 漲幅會限制獲利空間，提醒投資人注意策略風險。

bearish.title: This Is the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock I'd Buy if the Market Crashed Tomorrow — And no, itʻs not Nvidia.
bearish.reason: 市場評論員建議在市場崩盤時尋找替代標的，顯示部分投資人對 NVIDIA 目前的高估值感到擔憂。

neutral.title: Nvidia, AMD, & other chip names in focus at Computex 2026
neutral.reason: Computex 展會即將召開，市場預期將有新產品發布，目前處於消息發酵前的觀望階段。

neutral.title: Nvidia Stock At Key Support Ahead of Big Windows PC Launch
neutral.reason: 股價處於關鍵支撐位，市場正等待 Windows PC 產品發布帶來的明確方向性突破。

neutral.title: Nvidia, Apple, Isaac Newton And How To Trade Power Trends
neutral.reason: 文章旨在探討 AI 趨勢下的交易策略，並非針對 NVIDIA 基本面進行分析，對股價影響中性。
